title_i18n.zh-TW: 臺灣行政區地圖 — 人口熱區

description_i18n.zh-TW: 以 22 個縣市為單位的方塊型示意圖 (tile cartogram) 呈現臺灣人口分布,將 geo_basemap MCP 工具與人口資料的兩來源結合視覺化。為了讓 playground 完全自包含、不額外載入地圖函式庫,刻意採用 CSS Grid 而非真實地理投影;正式版以 368 個鄉鎮區為單位需連線至載入完整邊界向量的後端 (MapLibre GL + geo_basemap MCP 工具)。
description_i18n.en: Population choropleth of Taiwan's 22 counties as a CSS-grid tile cartogram (not a real geographic projection) — visualises the geo_basemap MCP tool joined with population data. The tile-cartogram approach keeps the playground fully self-contained without pulling in a mapping library; a real 368-township render needs a backend with MapLibre GL + full boundary vectors loaded.
